page_metadata.biotools__summary: a biomedical relation extraction dataset (BioRED) with multiple entity types (e.g. gene/protein, disease, chemical) and relation pairs (e.g. gene-disease; chemical-chemical) at the document level, on a set of 600 PubMed abstracts.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: a biomedical relation extraction dataset (BioRED) with multiple entity types (e.g. gene/protein, disease, chemical) and relation pairs (e.g. gene-disease; chemical-chemical) at the document level, on a set of 600 PubMed abstracts.
